It's an orthodox bar with several counter and box seats. The purple lighting somewhat compromises the atmosphere.
Perhaps because it's still early, there are only a few customers inside the bar,
and it doesn't seem very busy.
Behind the counter,
another bartender is making drinks ordered by the customers.
Standing against the backdrop of a lineup of drinks, from ones I know well to those I don't even know the names of, he appears quite imposing.
As usual, when I arrive, he doesn't leave my side like a dedicated bartender. I seem to be
a good way to pass the time for him.
Looking at my downcast face, they're making that expression again. It seems that whenever I come to this bar, I usually have a sour face.
You look a bit down, has something happened again?
Is that so? Am I really making that face?
You shouldn’t bottle things up too much. Eventually,
you might need a counselor.
Oh, come on.
I’m not that delicate.
I can’t say that, seeing how you've been lately. What about it, maybe you should seriously consider seeing a psychiatrist?
I don’t need to, not for me.
I won’t push you.
So, what’s the cause of your headache today?
Still, you know,
life can be full of suffering.
I wonder if enlightenment will come someday, like in the Zen world.
Who knows?
Honestly, I just want to feel better quickly.
Cheer up. Want to drink something strong?
Please.
Life is generally full of suffering.
Actually, Yuriko says she mistook the meeting place when she was supposed to meet her mother. Do you think it's okay to take that at face value?
I think it sounds plausible for that Yuriko.
But she checked the Guggenheim Museum herself before leaving and still went to MOMA, can you believe that?
That is
an incredibly strange story if you think about it.
In this case, just because Yuriko went to the meeting place doesn’t change the situation.
But if it was intentional, I’m curious about the reason behind it.
Exactly, that’s it.
Maybe it’s not something to worry too much about.
Shouldn’t you not think about it for now?
First off, I should say that I don't know where Cindy is.
That’s not really why I asked, though.
I was a bit hopeful, so it’s disappointing.
Am I Superman?
I have a bad feeling about this.
Let's not talk about this; it feels like it might become reality.
Yeah.
That's true.
I pray she is safe.
The police have indicated that the person who killed Eva Courtney is likely the same person behind the serial murder case.
Is that so?
Was Eva killed by that same criminal?
I can’t say for sure, but it seems she was dismembered because the murderer was provoked beyond necessary.
But doesn't it seem a bit strange?
What do you mean?
The killer was moving from place to place, yet here in New York,
they have already killed two people, as far as we know.
Why did the killer stop here?
Hey,
ＳＯ　ＷＨＡＴ?
do you know that place?
I think it used to be a normal club.
Is that so?
Yeah. The gay night was unusually lively, and before you knew it, it was gay night every night.
That's what I believe it was.
Maybe the owner was the type to go with the flow.
Well, who knows?
I remember it being a stable club with a decent crowd; not many unsavory types.
However, it’s well-known in certain circles, but not widely recognized, so it might feel sketchy if you’re not used to the vibe.
Uh.
Yeah, you really need to fit in well; otherwise, it won’t work.
But I don't think you have to be that stiff about it.
Oh,
Have you ever been there?
No. When you're in this line of work, customers share information with you.
If you go alone, you might be able to find a partner.
Stop joking.
I think life is all about experiences.
Right?
Then you might surprisingly fit in with the people at the bar.
Jennifer hasn't come to this place since then.
It's not like I was asking about that.
Is that so? You’re actually curious, aren’t you?
I guess you two have some sort of connection. She only shows up when you’re around.
Is that so? That’s new to me.
Actually, that’s true. There hasn’t been a single miss. It’s amazing.
She is
familiar with your schedule, I wonder?
He’s one of the few friends I can talk to about my worries without holding back. My bond with Ash is more than just customer and bartender.
He listens to my complaints without a single frown. He’s a nice guy.
I wonder how he knows so much.
I can't believe he’s so incompetent as to confuse Guggenheim Museum with MOMA. Is it really on purpose?
Does Yuriko have any motive to prevent Meryl and Cindy from reuniting?
Maybe there really is no ulterior motive.
It might just be the usual big joke of his.
Yuriko said that neither Cindy nor Meryl showed up. She mentioned that nobody came in front of the Guggenheim Museum.
That means neither of them knows where Cindy is. It’s not like Cindy messed up the meeting place too, right?
In many ways, she must have been looking forward to reuniting with her mother.
It seems unlikely that she would suddenly change her mind.
I wonder if there's a reason she can't come to our meeting place? Like someone stopped her or maybe she was kidnapped.
The method of the crime seems like an abnormal act to satisfy the pervert's twisted desires, but it's way too skillful.
Looking at the way the victim was dissected, one might think it was done by someone with medical knowledge.
In any case, it's not a case I can handle. I have no obligation to get involved, and it's better to leave it to the police.
I have to meet Anju soon.
It's a world I've never stepped into. I can't even imagine what it's like.
From what I've heard, it doesn't seem that dangerous. The only problem is whether I can get information about Tonny.
Anyway, it looks like I have no choice but to go check it out. Truth is,
I'd like her to accompany me,
but I can't ask for something like that.
How does she know what day I'm coming to this shop? Does she have some special ability?
She doesn't seem to like Jennifer very much. Though I guess there's no particular reason for that.
Is it a guy's intuition?
I want to see her so much, but going to find her myself feels awkward. I wouldn't want to be a bother.
Are you leaving already? Please come again.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
